title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Aptech - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Aptech - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Aptech. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Backend Developer to strengthen our Kolkata-based team.

About Aptech:
Aptech is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aptech!
